what: Present a folder picker for the user to choose the export destination
why: The user must choose where exported .md files will be written

success_handling.criteria: User selects a valid writable destination folder

error_handling.description: User dismissed the folder dialog without selecting — stay on current step
Selected path is not writable or no longer exists on the filesystem

decisions.reason: Single folder picker, category subdirs created by backend
decisions.rationale: Backend preserves category structure as subfolders — user only picks the root destination
